title: Server Heater
description: Prevents pesky server freezes upon shutdown
body:
# Server Heater

Because any server freezing when stopping needs a bit of warmth
to reach destination.

This mod detects when the server is entering its shutdown sequence,
and starts a non-blocking parallel process that will, at various
configurable intervals, try to push the rest of the game and other mods
to end up what they might be working on, and in the end, forcefully stop
it all if they don't comply.

### Why maximum/minimum mixin priority
Because this mod is not here to make compromises.
Your server ***will*** stop when supposed to.

---

Side note for modpacks and server owners, it is highly recommended to read the [settings description wiki page](https://codeberg.org/NerjalNosk/server_heater/wiki/Settings) in order to properly tune the mod to your configuration
